subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Thy letter was received and its contents were noted. Concerning association with others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق مکتوب شما رسید و بر مطلب اطلاع حاصل شد در خصوص معاشرت با سائر
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
